user_system_path: Master Audit #445, finding F-1 fix (Pass 0/Pass 10): CI was on: [workflow_dispatch] only — green-looking infra that never ran on PRs (main also unprotected). Turned CI ON for pull requests (types incl. ready_for_review) + kept workflow_dispatch. Budget protected by the EXISTING change-aware gating (docs/test PRs run only lint+unit, Playwright fires only when its routes change) + concurrency-cancel + a draft-skip guard on the `changes` job (CI fires only when a PR is marked ready). Owner-side remaining half: enable GitHub branch protection on main pointing at the `ci-passed` check (dashboard). Constraint: NO paid API calls.
allowed_files_raw: F-1 fix: the ci.yml trigger flip (+ draft-skip guard) + control-plane + any findings doc. No product/runtime/schema/deps.
forbidden_files_raw: No app/api, lib, or deps changes. Only the CI workflow trigger.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity (+ ci.yml YAML validated: pull_request+workflow_dispatch triggers, changes-job draft guard, ci-passed always())
required_browser_proof: N/A — CI trigger change. Live proof is the PR itself: this PR, when marked ready, becomes the first run of the change-aware pipeline on a PR.
acceptance_condition: ci.yml runs on pull_request (not just workflow_dispatch), draft PRs are skipped, the change-aware gating + concurrency are preserved, gate:continuity passes, and F-1 is recorded resolved (code half) in #445 with the branch-protection half flagged owner-side.
anti_regression_checks: ci.yml parses; triggers = pull_request + workflow_dispatch; changes job draft-guarded
stop_condition: Stop when the F-1 CI flip is merged and #445 records F-1 code-half done + branch-protection owner-half flagged.
next_command: Owner: enable branch protection on main → require the `ci-passed` check (the other half of F-1). Then continue the audit fix-in-pass (Pass 4 backend/runtime carries C-2; or frontend passes 6-8). Anthropic credits exist, so C-2/P0.2 paid validation is now feasible.
